india_destinations.name: Varanasi
india_destinations.famous_for: Ganga Aarti, Kashi Vishwanath Temple, Oldest Living City
india_destinations.description: The spiritual heart of India, famous for its ancient ghats and vibrant rituals on the banks of the Holy Ganges.

india_destinations.name: Jaipur
india_destinations.famous_for: Hawa Mahal, Amer Fort, City Palace
india_destinations.description: The 'Pink City' of India, known for its royal history, magnificent forts, and unique architectural heritage.

india_destinations.name: Goa
india_destinations.famous_for: Calangute Beach, Basilica of Bom Jesus, Nightlife
india_destinations.description: A world-renowned coastal destination offering beautiful beaches, Portuguese culture, and lively entertainment.

india_destinations.name: Munnar
india_destinations.famous_for: Tea Gardens, Eravikulam National Park, Anamudi Peak
india_destinations.description: A tranquil hill station in the Western Ghats famous for its vast tea plantations and mist-laden hills.

india_destinations.name: Bangalore
india_destinations.famous_for: Lalbagh Botanical Garden, Cubbon Park, ISKCON Temple
india_destinations.description: The Garden City and Silicon Valley of India, known for its pleasant climate and rapid urban growth.

india_destinations.name: Agra
india_destinations.famous_for: Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri
india_destinations.description: Home to the world-famous Taj Mahal, Agra is a must-visit for its rich Mughal history and monuments.

india_destinations.name: Rishikesh
india_destinations.famous_for: Ram Jhula, Triveni Ghat, Yoga Capital
india_destinations.description: A major spiritual hub and the Yoga capital of the world, situated at the foothills of the Himalayas.

india_destinations.name: Mumbai
india_destinations.famous_for: Gateway of India, Marine Drive, Bollywood
india_destinations.description: The financial capital of India, a bustling metropolis known for its coastal beauty and film industry.

india_destinations.name: Leh
india_destinations.famous_for: Pangong Lake, Khardung La Pass, Monasteries
india_destinations.description: A high-altitude desert city offering breathtaking landscapes, stark mountains, and serene Buddhist monasteries.

india_destinations.name: Amritsar
india_destinations.famous_for: Golden Temple, Jallianwala Bagh, Wagah Border
india_destinations.description: The spiritual and cultural center of the Sikh religion, home to the stunning Harmandir Sahib.

india_destinations.name: Hampi
india_destinations.famous_for: Virupaksha Temple, Stone Chariot, Vijayanagara Ruins
india_destinations.description: A UNESCO World Heritage site featuring the majestic ruins of the ancient Vijayanagara Empire.

india_destinations.name: Kolkata
india_destinations.famous_for: Victoria Memorial, Howrah Bridge, Dakshineswar Kali Temple
india_destinations.description: The cultural capital of India, known for its colonial architecture, art, and vibrant festivals.

india_destinations.name: Udaipur
india_destinations.famous_for: Lake Pichola, City Palace, Jagmandir
india_destinations.description: Known as the City of Lakes, Udaipur is one of India's most romantic cities with stunning palaces.

india_destinations.name: Alleppey
india_destinations.famous_for: Backwaters, Houseboats, Marari Beach
india_destinations.description: The Venice of the East, famous for its serene backwater cruises and picturesque palm-fringed canals.

india_destinations.name: Darjeeling
india_destinations.famous_for: Tea Gardens, Tiger Hill, Toy Train
india_destinations.description: A charming hill station offering spectacular views of Mount Kanchenjunga and world-famous tea.

india_destinations.name: Hyderabad
india_destinations.famous_for: Charminar, Golconda Fort, Salar Jung Museum
india_destinations.description: A historic city blending Nizam heritage with modern technology, famous for its pearls and biryani.

india_destinations.name: Puri
india_destinations.famous_for: Jagannath Temple, Puri Beach, Konark Sun Temple
india_destinations.description: A major pilgrimage site on the east coast, known for the annual Rath Yatra and golden beaches.

india_destinations.name: Indore
india_destinations.famous_for: Rajwada, Sarafa Bazar, Cleanest City in India
india_destinations.description: A commercial hub of Central India celebrated for its rich food culture and historic landmarks.

india_destinations.name: Shimla
india_destinations.famous_for: The Ridge, Mall Road, Jakhoo Temple
india_destinations.description: The former summer capital of British India, offering colonial charm and stunning Himalayan views.

india_destinations.name: Madurai
india_destinations.famous_for: Meenakshi Amman Temple, Thirumalai Nayakkar Mahal
india_destinations.description: One of the oldest cities in India, centered around the spectacular Dravidian-style Meenakshi Temple.

india_destinations.name: Khajuraho
india_destinations.famous_for: Kandariya Mahadeva Temple, Erotic Sculptures
india_destinations.description: Famous for its UNESCO-listed group of temples featuring intricate and expressive stone carvings.

india_destinations.name: Pondicherry
india_destinations.famous_for: Promenade Beach, Auroville, French Quarter
india_destinations.description: A unique coastal town blending French colonial heritage with spiritual tranquility.

india_destinations.name: Guwahati
india_destinations.famous_for: Kamakhya Temple, Brahmaputra River, Kaziranga (Nearby)
india_destinations.description: The gateway to Northeast India, located on the banks of the mighty Brahmaputra river.

india_destinations.name: Tirupati
india_destinations.famous_for: Tirumala Venkateswara Temple, Silathoranam
india_destinations.description: Home to the world's most visited sacred shrine, located atop the scenic Seshachalam Hills.

india_destinations.name: Jodhpur
india_destinations.famous_for: Mehrangarh Fort, Umaid Bhawan Palace, Blue City
india_destinations.description: The 'Blue City' known for its towering fort and vibrant blue houses in the old town area.

india_destinations.name: Gangtok
india_destinations.famous_for: Rumtek Monastery, Nathu La Pass, MG Marg
india_destinations.description: A mountain city offering panoramic views of the Himalayas and a center for Tibetan Buddhism.

india_destinations.name: Ahmedabad
india_destinations.famous_for: Sabarmati Ashram, Adalaj Stepwell, Akshardham Temple
india_destinations.description: India's first UNESCO World Heritage City, known for its cotton industries and textile heritage.

india_destinations.name: Manali
india_destinations.famous_for: Solang Valley, Hadimba Devi Temple, Rohtang Pass
india_destinations.description: A high-altitude resort town popular for honeymooners and adventure sports in the Himalayas.

india_destinations.name: Mysore
india_destinations.famous_for: Mysore Palace, Chamundi Hill, Brindavan Gardens
india_destinations.description: The cultural capital of Karnataka, famous for its royal heritage and the grand Dasara festival.

india_destinations.name: Shillong
india_destinations.famous_for: Elephant Falls, Umiam Lake, Scotland of the East
india_destinations.description: A hill station known for its pine trees, waterfalls, and cool mountain weather.

india_destinations.name: Pune
india_destinations.famous_for: Shaniwar Wada, Aga Khan Palace, Osho Ashram
india_destinations.description: The cultural capital of Maharashtra, known for its educational institutions and historic sites.

india_destinations.name: Kanyakumari
india_destinations.famous_for: Vivekananda Rock Memorial, Thiruvalluvar Statue, Sunrise
india_destinations.description: The southernmost tip of India, where the Arabian Sea, Bay of Bengal, and Indian Ocean meet.

india_destinations.name: Bhopal
india_destinations.famous_for: Upper Lake, Van Vihar, Taj-ul-Masajid
india_destinations.description: The City of Lakes, known for its natural beauty, historic mosques, and Nawabi culture.

india_destinations.name: Haridwar
india_destinations.famous_for: Har Ki Pauri, Kumbh Mela, Mansa Devi Temple
india_destinations.description: One of the holiest cities in India, where the Ganges enters the plains of North India.

india_destinations.name: Gwalior
india_destinations.famous_for: Gwalior Fort, Jai Vilas Palace, Tansen Tomb
india_destinations.description: Renowned for its hilltop fort and musical heritage, once a major center of princely India.

india_destinations.name: Bhubaneswar
india_destinations.famous_for: Lingaraj Temple, Udayagiri & Khandagiri Caves
india_destinations.description: The Temple City of India, featuring ancient sandstone architecture from the 7th-12th centuries.

india_destinations.name: Surat
india_destinations.famous_for: Diamond Cutting, Textile Market, Dumas Beach
india_destinations.description: A major economic hub known for its diamond and textile industries on the banks of Tapi river.

india_destinations.name: Orchha
india_destinations.famous_for: Ram Raja Temple, Jahangir Mahal, Chaturbhuj Temple
india_destinations.description: A hidden gem featuring grand palaces and temples reflecting the glory of the Bundela kings.

india_destinations.name: Srinagar
india_destinations.famous_for: Dal Lake, Mughal Gardens, Pashmina Shawls
india_destinations.description: The summer capital of J&K, famous for its houseboat stays and beautiful water-side gardens.

india_destinations.name: Jodhpur
india_destinations.famous_for: Mehrangarh Fort, Umaid Bhawan Palace, Blue City
india_destinations.description: The 'Blue City' of Rajasthan, dominated by the massive Mehrangarh Fort overlooking the old city.
